title: Verify existing implementation of breadcrumb component
description: The Breadcrumb component already exists at src/components/ui/breadcrumb.tsx with full implementation including props: items: { label: string; href?: string }[], active item (last) as plain text, others as links, chevron separators, and aria-label. Tests at src/components/ui/breadcrumb.test.tsx pass (8/8).
existing_patterns: src/components/ui/breadcrumb.tsx implements BreadcrumbItem interface with label and optional href
src/components/ui/breadcrumb.tsx uses ChevronIcon SVG separator pattern
